title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Assembly Bill 834 aims to establish partnership parity between podiatrists and Medical Doctors or Doctors of Osteopathic Medicine.
The legislation is intended to foster optimal patient care.
Doctors of Podiatric Medicine are often prevented from partnering with physicians in practice.
Podiatric training has evolved to include standardized, mandatory three-year residency programs.
The educational path of podiatrists follows the 4-4-3 model, similar to medical doctors.
Managing a podiatric practice is comparable to managing any MD or DO surgical specialty practice.
Restricting ownership interest in a professional partnership between a physician and a podiatrist does not make logical sense.
